title: there's a mislead about filter on podman docs
body:
### Feature request description

docs/source/markdown/podman-search.1.md.in ([web path](https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/markdown/podman-search.1.html))
![podman_search_wrong_explain](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/27112718/864819da-4560-490e-a19a-fcedfd4c17b5)

The image above is not the correct explain, I found the right one like below ([web path](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.0#tag/images/operation/ImageSearchLibpod))

![podman_search_right_explain](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/27112718/5004688d-9e3f-45b4-9767-9db260f1dac2)






### Suggest potential solution

should be at least number of stars , I confirmed the right output like this 

![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/27112718/0abfb483-957e-45b3-98f8-cf5043ba7e1d)

comments.body: Interested in opening a PR to fix?
@rhatdan I opened a PR to correct that section of the documentation.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@rhatdan As the PR by @kanielrkirby was merged, should be able to close this one?
